info.title: TMap API
info.description: TMap backend API. JWT-authenticated daily planning and task management. All routes are under /api/v1; errors use RFC 9457 ProblemDetails.

refreshToken.description: Refresh token — absent on web (httpOnly cookie); present for native clients.

expiresIn.description: Seconds until the access token expires.

AuthTokenResponse.description: Public OpenAPI-visible response for register / login / refresh.
